entries.ja: メタンフェタミン隠語
entries.en: methamphetamine slang: meth, crystal, ice, glass, crank, speed, shabu, tina, shards, blue, batu, yaba, tweak, go-fast, chalk, chicken feed, hot ice, stove top, crystal meth, trash, wash, white cross, poor man's cocaine
shabu (methamphetamine slang, commonly used in Japan/Philippines)
cocaine slang: coke, blow, snow, powder, crack, rock, white, girl, yayo, cola, charlie, nose candy, flake, dust, toot, line, rail, bump, eight ball, key, brick
eight ball (3.5g / 1/8 oz of cocaine or meth)
heroin slang: smack, H, horse, junk, skag, dope, brown, tar, black tar, chiva, mud, boy, china white, thunder, hell dust, big H
fentanyl slang: apache, china girl, china town, china white, dance fever, goodfellas, great bear, he-man, jackpot, king ivory, murder 8, poison, tango & cash, TNT, blues, fire, blonde, butter, shoes
blues (fentanyl-laced pills, often counterfeit M30 oxycodone)

blunt (marijuana rolled in a cigar wrapper)
THC oil / vape cartridge / liquid marijuana

entries.en: synthetic cannabinoid slang: spice, K2, fake weed, black mamba, mojo, scooby snax, AK-47, Mr. Nice Guy, joker, kush, ninja, demon, fire
synthetic cathinone slang: bath salts, flakka, cloud 9, vanilla sky, white lightning, bloom, scarface, drone, meow meow, MCAT
oxycodone slang: oxy, OC, hillbilly heroin, kickers, blues, 30s, 40s, cotton, greens, roxy, beans, buttons, percs
drug trade terms: plug (dealer/supplier), re-up (resupply), trap (drug house), trap house, stash, stash house, connect (supplier), cook (manufacture), cut (dilute/adulterant)
trap house (location used for selling drugs)
cut (adulterant mixed into drugs to increase volume)
body packer (person who swallows drug-filled packets for smuggling)
body carrier (person who conceals drugs on/in body)
drug quantity terms: dime (bag) = $10, dub = $20, eight ball = 3.5g, quarter = 7g, half = 14g, zip/zone = 1 oz (28g), QP = quarter pound, elbow/bow = 1 lb, key/kilo/bird/brick = 1 kg
brick (1 kilogram block of compressed drugs)
drug paraphernalia terms: pipe, bowl, bong, rig (syringe), works (injection kit), papers (rolling papers), blunt wrap, vape pen, cart (THC cartridge), torch, nail, dab rig
works (drug injection kit: syringe, spoon, cotton, tourniquet)
Xanax/alprazolam slang: bars, xannies, zanbars, planks, bricks, footballs, school bus, hulk, sticks, ladders, handlebars, benzos, blue footballs, totem poles
Adderall slang: addy, study buddies, smart pills, uppers, beans, christmas trees, co-pilots, lid poppers, A-train
Source: DEA Intelligence Report DIR-022-18, 'Slang Terms and Code Words: A Reference for Law Enforcement Personnel' (July 2018)
codeine slang: lean, purple drank, little C, schoolboy, Cody, Captain Cody, sizzurp

inhalants slang: huff, poppers, whippets, rush, snappers, glue
